name: Peanut Butter Marshmallo Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter the sides of a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Combine sugar, milk, and margarine in the saucepan.
3. Cook and stir over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil.
4. Continue cooking and stirring until the mixture reaches 236°F (soft ball stage).
5. Remove from heat and stir in peanut butter morsels, marshmallow cream, chopped nuts, and vanilla.
6. Mix well until the morsels are fully melted.
7. Pour the mixture into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch pan.
8. Allow to cool completely.
9. Cut into squares.
